name: fe-honest-guard
title: FE honest browser-path E2E guard
description: Add a NEW Playwright spec that drives the full TLC->CC->RE chain and asserts ONLY on visible DOM the user sees -- no /api/sessions/:id/events fallback, no page.reload() recovery, no waitForParamsForm nudge, no window.__ capture. It must go RED when the live UI freezes on an SSE stall, even though backend truth is correct. Additive: does NOT edit the existing 3 specs (tlc-retry-flow, cc-re-chained-flow, tlc-e2e-final-chain), which remain valid backend-contract proofs. Test code only (tests/); touches no product code.
creator: Drake
